summary: Operasional Setoran Harian (Daily Cash Deposit) module fully tested. All 20 backend API tests passed (1 skipped for non-existent kasir user). Frontend UI verified: list page with dashboard cards, form modal with 4 tabs, READ-ONLY branch/cashier info, journal entries with correct accounting.

BACKEND_API_TESTS.init_deposit_system: PASS - POST /api/deposit/init creates default account mappings
BACKEND_API_TESTS.create_deposit: PASS - POST /api/deposit/create auto-pulls from sales (NO manual input)
BACKEND_API_TESTS.update_deposit: PASS - PUT /api/deposit/{id} handles cash_received and difference calculation
BACKEND_API_TESTS.update_requires_reason: PASS - Rejects update with shortage but no difference_reason
BACKEND_API_TESTS.journal_creation: PASS - Journal entries created with correct accounts (Kas Pusat, Selisih Kurang/Lebih, Kas Cabang)
BACKEND_API_TESTS.list_by_status: PASS - Filter by status=posted works correctly
BACKEND_API_TESTS.list_with_difference: PASS - Filter by has_difference=yes works correctly
BACKEND_API_TESTS.admin_full_access: PASS - Admin can view all deposits (can_view_all=true)

FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.dashboard_cards: PASS - 4 cards: Pending Setor, Pending Verifikasi, Pending Approval, Ada Selisih
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.data_table: PASS - Shows deposits with columns: No.Setoran, Tanggal, Cabang, Kasir, Seharusnya, Diterima, Selisih, Status, Aksi
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.create_button: PASS - 'Buat Setoran Baru' button present and clickable
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.form_modal: PASS - Modal opens with header 'Buat Setoran Baru'
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.form_tabs: PASS - All 4 tabs present: Ringkasan, Transaksi, Selisih, Jurnal
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.readonly_fields: PASS - 7 lock icons indicating READ-ONLY fields for branch/cashier info
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.view_deposit: PASS - Clicking view shows deposit detail modal
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.journal_display: PASS - Journal tab shows accounting entries with correct accounts

ROLE_BASED_ACCESS.admin_access: PASS - Admin (PEMILIK) has full access to all deposits
ROLE_BASED_ACCESS.scope_filter: PASS - API returns scope information for role-based filtering
ROLE_BASED_ACCESS.kasir_test: SKIPPED - Test kasir user (kasir_test@ocb.com) does not exist in database

critical_code_review_comments: deposit_system.py - Well-structured with proper FAIL-SAFE security (default DENY)
SetoranHarian.jsx - Clean UI with proper data-testid attributes
SetoranForm.jsx - 4-tab layout with proper READ-ONLY indicators using Lock icons
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test deposits via pytest for dates 2026-03-12 through 2026-03-15
context_for_next_testing_agent: Setoran Harian module fully operational. Full workflow tested: create -> update -> receive -> verify -> approve -> post with journal creation. Journal entries correctly debit Kas Pusat and Selisih Kurang (for shortages), credit Kas Cabang. The kasir_test@ocb.com user does not exist in the database - if role-based access testing for KASIR is needed, the user must be created first with appropriate branch_id assignment.
